name: REVOPS_READER
comment: Read all schemas but NOT sensitive financials (sibling of ANALYST - does NOT inherit it)

name: REVOPS_DEVELOPER
comment: Read/write RAW + STAGING + MARTS (all envs); SERVICE-ONLY dbt role incl PROD; inherits READER only (read-all); financial-exempt via masking_exemptions (not analyst inheritance) so it stays READ-ONLY on SANDBOX

name: REVOPS_ADMIN
comment: Full domain access; only role that sees unmasked ARR

name: REVOPS_INGESTION_ADLS
comment: Write RAW telemetry (PRODUCT_EVENTS_RAW_ADLS) - Python/ADLS loader; service-only

name: REVOPS_INGESTION_FIVETRAN
comment: All privileges on tables+views in RAW Salesforce (SALESFORCE_RAW_FIVETRAN) - Fivetran connector; service-only

name: FINANCE_ANALYST
comment: Finance domain analyst - reads MARTS_FINANCE ONLY (not generic MARTS_*); demonstrates domain-scoped least privilege

name: FINANCE_READER
comment: Finance domain reader - reads MARTS_REVOPS (upstream source) + MARTS_FINANCE; does NOT inherit any RevOps role so finance devs stay blind to RAW/STAGING/RevOps sandboxes (domain isolation)

name: FINANCE_DEVELOPER
comment: Finance domain developer - inherits FINANCE_READER (read MARTS_REVOPS+MARTS_FINANCE) + writes MARTS_FINANCE; SERVICE-ONLY (finance-hub dbt CI incl PROD); financial-exempt via masking_exemptions
